query: Vetta X complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: VETTA is rated "Poor" with 2 / 5 on Trustpilot
results.content:
I did keep a few of the items I ordered (would recommend sizing down for sure!) I'm a little skeptical of the pieces I have kept since they don't seem as high of quality as I expected and from what others are saying they don't hold up well over time/washing. Mostly my complaint lies with the fabric- Tencel. The midi dress I ordered came folded in a plastic package and was full of wrinkles. Tencel is supposed to be pretty wrinkle resistant but strangely this was the opposite. It said it could be ironed so I carefully ironed on low and then on medium for about half an hour at least on one specific wrinkle and no matter what I tried it WOULDN'T come out! I couldn't believe a wrinkle would be so stubborn. I never did get it out and the dress was covered in them so I sent it back. I won't buy [...] That said, I am probably going to stop shopping from them after a recent customer service experience. I purchased some sale items I found on the website. Before I ordered, I double-checked the returns page. It says that I could return the items for store credit.So I purchased items - two of which didn't fit and were of horrible quality. I reached out to return them and Vetta told me they had no return policy. I sent them a link to the FAQ page I had on file. They didn't respond. Three days later, I went back to the email I sent them and the link I had sent them to the FAQ had been deactivated. I realize that page was an error on their part - they've clearly updated the page and removed it since I sent it to them. They did not respond to my question. I get they're a small business, but [...] I pressed further for clarity and suddenly the story changed - it was no longer that giftcards get processed first but that they had to avoid fraud and it wasn't their fault, the third party purchasing system did it for them, they had no control over their returns, etc. 

Long story short, they claimed they had no ownership over their return system or how it worked. I was also being pressured to make another order just to use up my giftcard balance with them. Their clothes are not cheap and the fact that I was expected to purchase again was not a small thing.

I bought a used vetta ii HD that had a couple issues. The seller said the edit function does not always work. I turned it on and can get sound, but I can't access any menus. I just see the screen with the tone knobs constantly moving. I can change patches, but cannot make any.

I downloaded the Line 6 Monkey software to hopefully do a flash to see if that helps, but I do not see flash as an option (I connected the midi out from the vetta to the midi in on my fast track pro). I am using a Mac and do not have access to a Windows machine so I hope this isn't an OS X bug. [...] ### TheRealZap

### TheRealZap

Grand Master")

I think it could be worth a try... i could only guess if that's it or perhaps a physical issue with the buttons?

Support would have more ideas than i do though.

# Vetta Tap Reviews

Trustindex
Vetta Tap

## Reviews

Trustindex

### 5.0

### | 13 total [...] Brilliant 4 in 1 tap, with boiling and cold filtered water and a separate shower/standard flexi hose, in stylish brushed steel that goes perfectly with our other appliances. Would fully recommend both this tap and the fitting service (think it's only currently available in certain areas at the moment) as well as the company in general. Quick and responsive customer service, fitter went out of his way to make the fitting perfect (even if we do have a hefty butler's sink that made it more of a job than most). Wish we could have got the 5 in 1, but we have limited space in our undersink cupboard and the extra cooling/fizzy water unit wouldn't fit. Thanks be to the guys at Vetta Tap for helping us figure this out and make the right choice!
Jake Rivers
Graham Noble
Braden Edwards

results.title: Vetta Capsule Review - out of office mode
results.content:
## The Cropped Mockneck Sweater – XS – Graphite

Can’t really go wrong with a simple, mockneck or turtle neck sweater with side zips. I like both versions, and found it manageable to switch between the two styles. The hidden buttons are not nearly as easy as the blazer, but only took me a few minutes to do / undo.

Like with the blazer dress, I wish this came in a wool version. I like that they used organic cotton, but I haven’t had great luck with cotton sweaters holding their shape after multiple wears, so I generally prefer wool!

## The Reversible Satin Midi Skirt – S – Gold / Cheetah [...] Fashion, Reviews

# Vetta Capsule Review

Last updated on March 16th, 2022 at 05:09 pmI’ve known about Vetta for some time now, but never had the occasion or...

Vetta Edgy Capsule Review

Last updated on March 16th, 2022 at 05:09 pm

Vetta Edgy Capsule Review

I’ve known about Vetta for some time now, but never had the occasion or need to try out their famed capsule collections. Similar to Amour Vert (a local favorite), Vetta works with local factories and organic or recycled materials to create classic pieces for work and for casual wear.

## Overview [...] Though they’ve launched a few new collections this year, I appreciate that they typically only make small modifications or updates to existing capsules each time they relaunch. For example, the same blazer dress, sweater and pants were featured in last year’s Edgy Capsule too. I decided to give a few pieces from this capsule, plus their reversible midi skirt a try. While the latter is simple and can be sewed, I have no desire to fiddle with sewing silk on the bias cut :)

Now, onto the reviews:

## The Blazer Dress – XS – Plaid

Vetta Blazer Dress
